Contact: Email: knikhilreddy2001@gmail.com

Contact: Phone: +1(737) 396-6514

Professional Summary: Senior Java Developer with over 5 years of experience designing and implementing enterprise-grade, cloud-native applications across E-commerce, healthcare, and media domains. Built and integrated secure international payment terminals for ECP website using Authorize.net and Stripe, enabling seamless global e-commerce transactions. Experienced in applying data structures and algorithms including sorting, searching, hashing, and index bucketing to optimize performance and data processing efficiency. Professional Summary: Expert in Java 8/11/17, Spring Boot microservices, RESTful APIs, GraphQL, and event-driven architectures with Kafka and RabbitMQ. Skilled in AWS and Azure cloud platforms, containerization using Docker, Kubernetes, and Helm. Proficient in OAuth2, JWT, RBAC-based authentication and API security best practices.

Professional Summary: Experienced in database development using Oracle, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and Redis. Strong in CI/CD automation using Jenkins, GitHub Actions, and Azure DevOps. Adept in Agile/Scrum methodologies, cloud cost optimization, observability with ELK, Prometheus, and Grafana, and AI-driven automation for performance improvements. Technical Skills: Languages & Frameworks: Java 8/11/17, Python, TypeScript, Spring Boot, Spring Cloud, Spring MVC, Spring Security, Hibernate, RESTful APIs, GraphQL, Microservices Architecture. Technical Skills: Frontend Technologies: Angular 14+, React.js, Next.js, JavaScript ES6+, Tailwind CSS, HTML5, CSS3. Technical Skills: Cloud & DevOps: AWS EKS, EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda, CloudWatch, Azure App Services, Azure DevOps, Blob Storage, Docker, Kubernetes, Helm, Jenkins, GitHub Actions, Terraform, Ansible, CI/CD pipelines, Infrastructure as Code. Technical Skills: Databases: Oracle, PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, DynamoDB.

Technical Skills: Messaging & Streaming: Apache Kafka, RabbitMQ, Kafka Streams, AWS SNS/SQS. Technical Skills: Testing: JUnit5, TestNG, Mockito, REST Assured, Jest, TDD methodologies. Technical Skills: Monitoring: ELK Stack, Prometheus, Grafana, Splunk, CloudWatch, Log4j, Application Insights. Technical Skills: Security & API Management: OAuth2, JWT, RBAC, SSO, Swagger, API Gateway, TLS/HTTPS, HIPAA and SOC2 compliance. Experience - Codelance IT (Jan 2024 – Present): Built the front-end architecture for Ethics Consulting Partners (ECP), a multi-module e-commerce platform combining Corporate Training and Promo Store, using Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Delivered responsive, high-performance UI aligned with Figma designs. Experience - Codelance IT: Developed backend services using NestJS and REST APIs for authentication, course management, B2B user accounts, and product catalogs. Ensured scalability, maintainability, and secure data flow.

Experience - Codelance IT: Integrated Absorb LMS via REST APIs, enabling enterprise-grade training content sync, user progress tracking, and SSO experiences. Built custom B2B modules supporting client-specific configurations and dashboards. Experience - Codelance IT: Developing an AI-powered chatbot assistant using Claude API and Next.js to enhance user engagement and support automation across the ECP platform. Experience - Codelance IT: Implemented intelligent search, sorting, and filtering logic in Next.js for dynamic courses and product pages. Optimized performance with caching and efficient data-fetching strategies. Experience - Codelance IT: Integrated secure payment gateways including Authorize.net and Stripe. Built scalable cart and checkout system using Zustand with real-time state updates and cart persistence. Experience - Codelance IT: Implemented Jest tests, GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines, and Docker for automated deployments.

Deployed ECP web apps on a VPS using Nginx for SSL termination and load balancing. Experience - Cognizant (Feb 2022 – Jun 2023): Developed Spring Boot microservices for EMR systems using JWT-secured REST and GraphQL APIs ensuring HIPAA and FHIR compliance. Experience - Cognizant: Optimized high-volume appointment scheduling modules using slot bucketing, hashing, and index-based optimizations, improving performance by 40%. Experience - Cognizant: Optimized PostgreSQL queries, implemented Redis caching, reduced database load, and improved API response times by 30%. Experience - Cognizant: Automated CI/CD workflows with Jenkins and Docker, deploying microservices on AWS EKS with EC2, S3, and RDS integrations. Experience - Cognizant: Implemented real-time monitoring using ELK Stack and Splunk to proactively identify and resolve issues. Worked in Agile/Scrum methodology using Jira.

Experience - Adobe (Jan 2020 – Feb 2022): Developed modular Java backend services for content management systems to improve code maintainability and reusability. Experience - Adobe: Optimized JSP components and Servlets for improved application performance. Applied TDD with JUnit and Mockito. Experience - Adobe: Automated Linux deployments using Bash scripts and implemented centralized error logging for better fault traceability. Education: Master of Science in Computer and Information Systems, Saint Louis University, USA (Dec 2024). Certifications: AWS Certified Developer – Associate (DVA-C02). Projects - Agent Tina (AI Job Matching & Resume Analysis Agent): Problem: Traditional job platforms rely on keyword matching and static filters. This leads to missed matches, weak ATS alignment signals, and low visibility into skill gaps.

Projects - Agent Tina (AI Job Matching & Resume Analysis Agent): Solution: Built Agent Tina to actively discover jobs from public sources (company career pages and Greenhouse-powered listings), understand resumes and job descriptions semantically, and generate explainable match results with clear fit reasoning. Projects - Agent Tina (Agentic AI Architecture): Agentic AI architecture: Resume Parser Agent (structured candidate profile), Job Parser Agent (normalized job schema), Matching Agent (semantic ranking), ATS Scoring Agent (ATS-aligned fit signals), Skill Gap Agent (missing or weak skills), Dedup Agent (removes duplicate postings). Projects - Agent Tina (RAG & Retrieval): RAG grounding: Jobs and resumes are embedded and stored in a vector database. At query time, relevant context is retrieved and injected into prompts so outputs remain grounded in retrieved evidence and reduce hallucinations.

Projects - Agent Tina (Tech Stack): Tech stack: Node.js, TypeScript, Azure OpenAI (LLMs + embeddings), RAG and prompt engineering, agentic workflows, Qdrant / FAISS (vector search), Supabase (database and auth), REST APIs.
